reviews.review_text: Fun game big space map and alot of missions and jobs

Wobbly life is a pretty fun game. In the game, you can drive cars, buy houses, and work at jobs. The way I would describe it is a more kid friendly GTA. Overall it is a pretty solid game and would recommend it to others.
This game is genuinely so intresting and fun, NPCs are pretty interatactive, and if your not in it for the sandbox, theres other stuff you can do! its basically for everyone!

I really want to write a good review for this game but i just cant.  this game has so many fun jobs and things to do with friends but there are a lot of cons to it
1-game just gets boring after a while
2- they jacked up the price form 10$ to 22$ which is a HUGE difference for what the game is 
3- there are never updates and when there are updates its fun for like a week and then you go back to your boring old ways and in the games 5 years of the game being up its only had like 4 major updates

the moral of the story is that I am not a karen you can get the game if you wish please think before buying the game
the game is real good but when it comes down to the transport it is very uncontrollable and iv lost thousands of dollars cuz i fell into the water

it is fun. i like it. (ps. start the toxic waste removal job then take a helicopter into one of the smokestacks and in one of them there is a secret room where you can go to the back behind some barrels and find the secret toxic waste car)
Very cutesy, buy it. Its fun. Lots of cool minigames.
This game hyped me up,its a game for all ages and is super fun,so much to do and its fun playing with dad-thanks pops!

This game is one of a kind. Most people if given the chance would want to play roblox or fortnite or rust for the first time again, but for me i would choose wobbly life. You discover so many unique quests and tools. It also creates amazing memories from the comfort of your own room. The best part of the game is that you can play however you want and art any pace. Its also even more fun with friends!

Wobbly life is really fun. I recommend it to anyone that can purchase it and its very fun with friends. Its a silly liitle game with a big impact on me. Also, in the past 2 days, ive acumilated over 5 hours and thats going to keep on growing.  10/10
Really goofy and cute, with a LOT to do around the map. Super fun with a friend/partner, or group of people.
W GAME Absolutley reccomend great game with friends just good overall.

Play it please. I DONT CARE IF ITS 25 DOLLARS, its a masterpiece and i cant wait for more updates here is its best features: 1: Artifacts: Very fun its a great way to keep you hooked in the game as it also gives you rewards if beating a set. 2: Missions: Missions are very fun when starting the game lots (kinda) of jobs i love working wobbly jobs. THREE: secrets: yes veeery cool find secrets yes yes. LASTLY BUT NOT LEASTLY: louie: he makes this game very complete play NOWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWW (summery i guess is this how you spell) Wobbly life is a very good game made by a INDIE game and is in my top 10 BUT i just think this of the game you can think differently and thats fine have a wobbly day ig.
I like it a lot its just a really chill or chaotic game however you want to make it. And the game is really fun either way.

This game is the most amazing game i have ever played. it has everything. want to get a job? you can! drive a car? you can! feed an interdimensional being uranium? you can! want to give pizza to a UFO? you  can! there is literally so many secrets in this game it is almost impossible to 100% the game. SERIOUSLY. PLAY THE GAME RIGHT NOW

this is the bets game in the entire freaking universe it has so much to do so you wont get board like jobs colecting artifacts and doing quests for money to buy houses and cars and cloths.

also you can get really cool things like buying food and stuff and you get paid for doing quests

SUPER FUN GAME!!! 
I haven't gotten bored at all while playing this game. Its super fun and there is plenty to do offline! I can't even imagine how fun multiplayer could be.
Its a very fun life sim. so much to do and see too. I am currently trying to 100% it. should you 100% it? if you value your sanity ,NO PLEASE SAVE YOUR SELF FROM THAT FATE
This game is fun to play alone or with friends, there are a lot of puzzles and things to do. This game is very simple but very fun.
It is a fun game to play with online friends and family members. It is fun for everyone and can lead to fake, silly arguments. Sometimes it can glitch but thats to be expected with any game.
This is a very fun free world game that I really enjoyed since there are so many secrets and fun items to use and unlock.

This is really fun game but somtimes the game ragbaits you. For example when you try to bring an artifact to the museum and loose it from like a storm when lighting hits you or your in a hellacopter then blow up landing then seeing the artifact roll in the water then disapers and spend 75 dollars just to loose a artifact. But anyway the game is fun but the museum not but the rewards are cool.

Fantastic game, I really love playing this with my family. I would really love it if they would make this cross platform play compatible. They could create goals and hints to find the hidden gems, that would make it fun. Also being able to actually eat things you buy or something like that. It's really work playing though. Highly recommend.
i love it cause the jobs, free outfits, and the present.
Peak game, especially with friends. The physics are goofy yet enjoyable, and the characters all feel alive. 10/10 game.
lowkey best game ever funny and fun best to play w friends <3

I could pitch this as GTA for kids. But I haven't played GTA.
The amount of "things to do" in this game tremendous. And the game doesn't force you to do any of it. You just run around Wobbly Island, Put out a fire, discover the eldritch horror under the nuclear power plant (He's really friendly, actually). Fall asleep and wake up in the sky, fly a fighter jet (no armament of course, this is GTA for kids). You can steal someone's car, or three wheeler. You can help the detective find out who is hanging people off the side of buildings, you can fly with rubber ducks, make like the tomb raider, watch a romance movie, and finally decide to start playing co-op and steal other hardworking wobblies' money. Or try and drive the train while other wobblies try to board it (I could only do this with a friend and a Mission Impossible style helidrop). The game gives you a lot of freedom from the beginning, and the the more you look the more you find.
The above is not alot of what the game has to offer. It's huge. My brother has approaching 400hrs now in this thing and has memorised almost everything down to the location of the nearest gas canister.

Cons:
There is notable input lag when you play online. With a good connection it just makes the hardest platforming in the game a challenge. It can be really bad depending on the connection. The game does miss a bit of quality of life, but ultimately is very stable and smooth enough. (I wish I could have some sort of quick select when choosing my favourite sportcar instead of having to push the menu button an extra time foreach quest I complete).

TLDR:
Many things to do. And many you can invent for yourself to do. Get a friend and play together. Or go on some poor fool's world throw their favourite vehicle in the river.
9/10 would wobble again

The game is good, but could have been made better and with more content.
Missions are mostly to go really far in one direction and then have to travel back, usually loaded with magical necessities in a vehicle that drops stuff every now and then, in the other direction.
So missions are few and there to waste your time making the game feel less empty.
I really like the game's feel, design and mechanics but there is no getting around that it is very very empty and lacking of real tangible content.
They're working on a sequel and that hopefully presents a world that feel more inhabited.

This one is recommended only if it's on sale. There is still much to like about this game.
Also fun in couch split-screen, something that is rare these days.

I’ve spent 200 hours being a yellow noodle with zero bones, and honestly? My real life feels too stable now. I’ve crashed planes, delivered pizzas into the ocean, and earned millions just to buy a house I’m too wobbly to walk through. 10/10 – I have forgotten what a spine is, and I don’t want it back.

This game is soooooooooooo good!

Pros:
- Really fun with friends
- Great open-world
- Awesome arcade mode

Cons:
- Limits in Steam Workshop
- Costs almost $30
- Feels kind of like "GTA at home" (do you get the Fortnite reference?)

Still though... this game is a must-play game, 10/10! 😎🔥
Very fun interactive sandbox lots of stuff to do

One of the few reviews I've ever wrote for a game, and that's because games have to exceed my expectations to warrant typing about it. Wobbly Life is actually so much more fan, vast, and interactive than I ever thought it would be. It started as just a silly purchase for my girlfriend and I to couch co-op on. We've been getting into splitscreen gaming recently. We didn't have much expectations. And wow, we're hooked 😂😂 Easily could sink 60+ hours into this I'm sure. We managed 13 hours in our first weekend playing together. Genuinely worth every penny.
This game is fun, to do jobs, drive, explore and just mess around! why not buy it?

The video on the store page showed a building being knocked down, giving me a far different impression of what this game is and what it's capable of, than what it actually can do.  Turns out, that's a very specific building, destroyed during a specific job.  This was how the whole game felt; "Oh, can I do this!?  No, it doesn't actually work like that."  Very disappointing, especially considering the Overwhelmingly Positive reviews.  Just expected a different product, I suppose.

I wanted to play this game on the couch with the kids, but it doesn't support two player split screen coop unless one player is on kb+m.

Looked like a fun game otherwise.

BUT I DO STILL THINK IF YOU ARE READING THIS YOU SHOULD REALLY PLAY THIS GAME CAUSE WHEN YOU GO ON THAT PRIVATE SERVER IT MAKES YOU FEEL CALM. WHEN YOU GO ON THAT ONLINE SERVER YOU MAKE FREINDS. SURE YOU CANT CHAT TO THEM IN THE WAY YOU WANT TO BUT IT DOES GIVE YOU LITTLE MOTIONS AND WORDS TO SHOW EMOTIONS. SO IF YOU ARE LOOKING FOR A FAMILY FREINDLY FUNNY GAME THIS IS THE GAME! CAUSE THIS GAME HAS ONLINE AND OFFLINE OUTFITS JOBS. ANYTHING YOU WANT ANY DREAM YOU HAVE YOU CAN MAKE IT COME TRUE!
